name: OpenClaw Multi-Channel Gateway
description: Bridges external messaging channels (Discord, Telegram, Slack) into Agentop's multi-agent orchestrator via OpenClaw gateway (port 18789). Includes firewall with 12 red-line patterns, 4 exfiltration domain blocks, rate limiting (30 req/min), and lex-v2 router integration. Based on GoClaw/OpenClaw (NetworkChuck-inspired, local-first Zapier alternative).
